overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit alleyway in Night City. The player navigates past metal walkways, narrow corridors, and commercial storefronts with holographic advertisements, encountering NPCs and street vendors in a dense cyberpunk urban environment.

events.description: turning left from the main platform into a narrow dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated metal grating platform and turning left into a narrow service corridor

bright red neon arrow pointing forward on the wall
string of traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead

safety railings along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated metal walkway with red neon signage and paper lanterns visible ahead. The player turns left into a narrow industrial corridor with concrete walls and metal grating floors, moving away from the open platform area.

exiting the enclosed corridor into the open rainy street

opening at the end of the corridor revealing the rainy street beyond

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a dimly lit industrial corridor with concrete walls and metal flooring. Overhead lights provide sparse illumination as the player approaches the exit, where rain and neon lights from the outside become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked back alley with neon commercial signs and metal railings

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the open alley, heavy rain falls on the wet concrete as neon signs reflect off the pavement. The player walks alongside a concrete retaining wall with metal railings, approaching a commercial building with a prominent red 18+ neon sign and holographic advertisements.

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the 18+ club entrance where NPCs are gathered around the window display. After passing the club, the player turns right at the corner, revealing concrete stairs and vending machines along the wall, with trash piles visible on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial alley with food vendors and stair access

agents.ego_description: walking past concrete stairs and food vendor stalls in the rainy alley

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a food stall counter

entered.detail: orange neon sign for Garfunkel Falkstein Co above a doorway
wooden food stall with overhead lighting and menu displays

segments.scene_description: Moving past the club area, the player walks along the alley passing the Garfunkel Falkstein Co sign and various food vendor stalls. A vendor stands behind a counter on the right while concrete stairs are visible in the distance, with rain continuing to fall on the reflective pavement.

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a food cart with glowing red neon lighting and illuminated merchandise on display. In the distance, concrete stairs lead upward between the buildings, with various neon signs and market stalls visible along the rain-soaked alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered industrial walkway into a rain-drenched, neon-lit commercial alley. It begins on an elevated metal platform adorned with red signage and paper lanterns before turning left into a dimly lit concrete corridor with metal grating floors. As the camera reaches the end of this passage, the scene opens into a heavy downpour where neon lights reflect off wet pavement and the player passes a club entrance marked by a prominent red 18+ sign and holographic advertisements. The movement then shifts around a corner past vending machines and trash piles, gliding along a retaining wall toward various food vendor stalls and the Garfunkel Falkstein Co sign. Finally, the path leads toward a glowing red food cart and distant concrete stairs, with the environment fully transforming into a dense, rain-soaked urban market.
